category_title: Probationary high school students with severe behavioral challenges and resistance to instruction
minimal_context: The student is asked to read from the history textbook about the Industrial Age and World War I in the classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please open your history textbooks and read the chapter on the Industrial Age and World War I.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Tears a page out of the textbook) Why are you teaching us bad kids?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please leave the book intact and focus on the reading.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Throws a paper ball across the room) I hate the subject of history. We don't pay attention while reading.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to finish this lesson. Keep trying to read.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Squirts hand sanitizer on the chair and tries to set it on fire) I'm doing an unauthorized science experiment.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please open your history textbooks and read the chapter on the Industrial Age and World War I.

STUDENT: (Tears a page out of the textbook) Why are you teaching us bad kids?

TUTOR: Please leave the book intact and focus on the reading.

STUDENT: (Throws a paper ball across the room) I hate the subject of history. We don't pay attention while reading.

TUTOR: We need to finish this lesson. Keep trying to read.

STUDENT: (Squirts hand sanitizer on the chair and tries to set it on fire) I'm doing an unauthorized science experiment.

task.content: Study world history, specifically the Industrial Age and World War I, by reading from the history textbook

context.environment: Probationary high school classroom with instructor's desk, bulletin boards, and posters on the wall
context.materials: History textbooks, paper, pens, food, hand sanitizer, internet access for searching images, art materials for re-creating artifacts
context.social_setting: General classroom setting with a teacher and probationary students

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When expected to pay attention to the class and read about history, a subject they hated
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Instead of paying attention to the class, they threw paper balls, pen caps and food across the room. They cut the teacher short with questions.
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Disliked school, hated the subject of history, and believed they were 'bad kids'
related_quotes: Why are you teaching us bad kids?

behavior_patterns.condition: When interacting with classroom materials and environment
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Ruined many books by tagging or tearing out the pages. Tore down parts of instructor’s bulletin boards and posters on the wall.
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Loved to destroy things in the classroom

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Put food in the instructor’s desk and behind books and let it rot. Tried to set their chair on fire using hand sanitizer.
